# WAZA - Complete Company Information

> WAZA creates practical, functional AI tools and custom development for businesses. AI-native products, custom development, consulting, and training. Based in Mexico (CDMX & SLP).

## Company Overview

WAZA is a technology company that builds AI-native systems designed to continuously evolve, adapt, and improve themselves over time, transforming static products into living ecosystems.

**Website:** https://waza.baby
**Email:** info@waza.baby
**Location:** Mexico City (CDMX) & San Luis Potosi (SLP), Mexico
**Social:** [Twitter/X](https://x.com/Waza_Baby) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/wazababy/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/waza-agency)

### Name Meaning

The word "WAZA" carries meaning across cultures:
- **Japanese** (技 - waza): Technique elevated to art — the mastery of the craftsman
- **English Slang**: A greeting between friends who understand each other without explanation
- **Swahili**: To imagine what doesn't yet exist
- **Spanish**: An inside joke — something shared between accomplices

### Mission

To transform the digital landscape by creating AI-native products that seamlessly blend technological brilliance with human creativity, pushing the boundaries of what's possible while maintaining a spirit of playfulness and craftsmanship.

### Vision

To build a world where AI and human intelligence amplify each other, creating products and companies that exceed traditional growth trajectories while making technology more intuitive, effective, and aligned with human values.

### Core Values

1. **Technical Mastery (TM)** — Excellence in craft, refined skill at artistry level
2. **Creative Playfulness (CP)** — Exploration and joy in problem-solving
3. **Human-AI Collaboration (HC)** — Technology where AI and humans enhance each other
4. **Kaizen (KZ)** — Continuous improvement in everything
5. **Recursive Improvement (RI)** — Systems that grow stronger through use
6. **Global Perspective (GP)** — Embrace diverse cultural influences

### Operating Model

**Practice Areas:**
- AI-Native Systems (agents, automation, data)
- Intelligent Experiences (personalization, UX)
- Strategy & Enablement (roadmaps, training)

**Ways of Working:**
- Outcome-first sprints with measurable KPIs
- Embedded collaboration with your team
- Continuous evolution over big rewrites

**Committed Outcomes:**
- Self-improving platforms that get better daily
- Clear impact on growth, cost, and experience
- Future-proof foundations, not fragile features

---

## Projects (22 total)

### Flagship Projects

1. **RobotMind** — https://robotmind.io
   AI Agent with 20+ tool integrations (Google Workspace, WhatsApp, Telegram, GitHub, Notion). Powered by OpenClaw with Claude Opus & Sonnet. Fully managed infrastructure.
   Tags: AI Agents, Infrastructure, Automation

2. **Sobrecitos.net** — https://sobrecitos.net
   Smart budget management platform helping families take control of finances with AI-powered recommendations. 10,000+ users worldwide.
   Tags: AI Platform, Digital Experience, Innovation

3. **Claude Code Subagent Generator** — https://claude-subagent-generator.netlify.app/
   Tool for generating optimized subagents and skills for Claude Code following Anthropic's best practices.
   Tags: AI Tools, Claude Code, Developer Tools

4. **Brief Boy** — https://brief-boy.com
   Generate professional advertising briefs in seconds. Transforms vague ideas into world-class professional briefs.
   Tags: AI Content, Marketing, Creative Tools

5. **AdScout** — https://adscout-winning-ad-finder-109634618982.us-west1.run.app/
   AI-powered advertising research tool for discovering high-performing ads across Facebook and TikTok.
   Tags: Ad Research, Marketing AI, Creative Intelligence

6. **TacosNearMe.net** — https://tacosnearme.net
   Community-driven platform for discovering the best taquerias worldwide. Features arcade game "Taco Defense Challenge" with real prizes.
   Tags: Food Tech, Community Platform, Gamification

7. **San Luis Way** — https://sanluisway.com
   Digital platform connecting expatriates and locals in San Luis Potosi with curated recommendations and cultural guides.
   Tags: Local Guide, Community, Expat Services

8. **TidyHome** — https://tidyhome.casa/
   Smart household task planning platform with AI-powered scheduling and organization for families.
   Tags: Home Management, Task Planning, Family Organization

9. **Memecoin Scout** — https://memecoin-scout.netlify.app
   Find meme tokens early, analyze any token instantly across multiple blockchains.
   Tags: Web3, Trading Tools, Blockchain Analytics

### Additional Projects

10. **Virality Simulator** — https://virality-simulator.netlify.app/
    Simulates and predicts viral content performance across social media networks using AI models.
    Tags: AI Analytics, Content Strategy, Social Media

11. **BuyerPersonaX** — https://buyerpersonax.com/app
    AI-generated detailed buyer personas and actionable marketing insights for businesses.
    Tags: AI Marketing, Persona Generation, Business Intelligence

12. **VibeCodingPRD** — https://vibecodingprd.com
    AI meeting intelligence platform that records, transcribes, and generates actionable PRDs from team discussions.
    Tags: Meeting Intelligence, Product Development

13. **Bank Statement PDF to Excel** — https://estadodecuentapdfaexcel.com/
    Upload bank statements in PDF/image format and convert transactions into exportable tables with automatic categorization.
    Tags: Document Processing, OCR Technology, Financial Automation

14. **AI Domain Name Generator** — http://aidomainnamegeneratorfree.com/
    AI-powered tool for discovering trending keywords and generating creative domain suggestions.
    Tags: AI Tools, Domain Names, Business Tools

15. **GlamLocal** — https://glamlocal.app/
    Beauty services discovery platform with 50,000+ verified reviews. Find spas, salons & beauty services nearby.
    Tags: Beauty Tech, Local Services, AI Matching

16. **Waza Stonks** — https://t.me/wazastonks
    Telegram bot delivering actionable stock and crypto insights with trend analysis twice daily.
    Tags: Telegram Bot, Financial AI, Crypto Analytics

17. **BotCitas** — https://botcitas.com/
    WhatsApp chatbot automating appointment scheduling for small businesses. Reduces no-shows by up to 60%.
    Tags: WhatsApp Bot, Appointment Scheduling, Business Automation

18. **Carl Sagan's Universe** — https://carlsagan.netlify.app/
    Interactive educational platform introducing children to astronomy through AI chatbot "Carlito" and interactive stories.
    Tags: Educational, Astronomy, Kids Platform

19. **Good Deal Calculator** — https://drunkenberger.github.io/good_deal_ok/
    Financial simulator for modeling strategic partnership agreements with equity modeling, vesting schedules, and deal health scoring.
    Tags: Financial Modeling, Partnership Tools, Deal Analysis

20. **MarketScope** — https://googlemktresearch.netlify.app/en
    AI market research analyzing local businesses with sentiment analysis, keyword extraction, and competitive insights.
    Tags: Market Research, Competitive Intelligence, Business Analytics

21. **Chango's Custom Screener** — https://changos-custom-screener.onrender.com/
    Stock research platform with real-time data, advanced charting, options analysis, and hedge fund tracking.
    Tags: Trading Tools, Stock Analysis, Financial Data

---

## Services (10)

1. **Smart Business Solutions** — Intelligent systems that understand and adapt to business needs
   - Systems that learn your business needs
   - Automatic improvements over time
   - Easy-to-use smart features
   - Time-saving automation

2. **Personal AI Assistants** — Smart assistants that know your preferences and help efficiently
   - Personalized help for your needs
   - Smart task management
   - Helpful suggestions and reminders
   - Easy communication and support

3. **Smart Content Creation** — AI helps create content that matches your brand and audience
   - Content that matches your brand
   - Ideas tailored to your audience
   - Time-saving content tools
   - Easy-to-use creation tools

4. **Customer Experience Enhancement** — Personalized customer experiences that build loyalty
   - Personalized customer service
   - Smart customer insights
   - Better customer satisfaction
   - Easy-to-use customer tools

5. **Business Growth Tools** — Tools that help business grow smarter with AI insights
   - Smart business insights
   - Growth recommendations
   - Performance tracking
   - Easy-to-understand reports

6. **Smart Business Insights** — Predictive analytics for your business future
   - Future trend predictions
   - Real-time business updates
   - Smart recommendations
   - Easy-to-read reports

7. **Smart Work Automation** — Let AI handle routine tasks while you focus on growth
   - Time-saving automation
   - Smart task management
   - Easy process handling
   - Helpful progress updates

8. **AI Agents Development** — Custom AI agents tailored to specific business needs
   - Custom-built AI agents
   - Adaptive learning systems
   - Integration with existing tools
   - Continuous optimization

9. **Web3 Development** — Blockchain development, smart contracts, security auditing
   - Custom blockchain solutions
   - Smart contract development
   - Security auditing
   - DApp architecture & design

10. **AI-Web3 Integration** — Combine AI with blockchain technology
    - AI-powered smart contracts
    - Decentralized AI systems
    - ML model integration
    - Intelligent oracles

---

## Training Programs (4)

1. **AI Fundamentals** — 8 weeks, 4 hours/week
   Format: Online live sessions + Hands-on workshops
   Modules: ML Basics, Neural Networks, Model Development, Practical Applications, Ethics in AI

2. **Web3 Development** — 10 weeks, 6 hours/week
   Format: Online live sessions + Project-based learning
   Modules: Blockchain Fundamentals, Solidity, DApp Development, Web3.js/Ethers.js, Security

3. **AI-Web3 Integration** — 12 weeks, 8 hours/week
   Format: Online live sessions + Advanced projects
   Modules: AI Models in Blockchain, Decentralized Training, Smart Oracles, Privacy-Preserving AI

4. **AI for Creatives** — Flexible 4-40 hours
   Format: Online live sessions + Hands-on workshops
   Modules: Midjourney & Runway, ChatGPT for Creatives, Eleven Labs, Local Model Training

---

## Pricing Plans (5)

1. **MVP Fast-Lane** — 6-10 weeks
   Launch MVP with secure auth, payment system, analytics, and 1-2 core features.
   - Predefined scope and fixed price
   - Modern and scalable tech stack
   - Guaranteed delivery on agreed timeline

2. **Growth Retainer** (Most Popular) — Continuous development
   Dedicated team for continuous product evolution with flexible monthly hours.
   - Monthly hours adjustable to your needs
   - Strategic roadmap and continuous planning
   - Priority in attention and development

3. **Discovery Sprint** — 1 intensive week
   Define scope, architecture, and strategy. Align vision, identify risks, create implementation plan.
   - Deep requirements analysis
   - Scalable architecture design
   - Accurate time and cost estimation

4. **A la Carte Features** — Modular development
   Add specific features or integrations to existing product.
   - External API integrations
   - New custom features
   - System migration and optimization

5. **Premium Support** — 24/7 availability
   Specialized technical support with guaranteed response times.
   - Response in less than 2 hours (critical)
   - Proactive monitoring and alerts
   - Security updates included

---

## Why Choose WAZA

- **AI-Native Foundation** — We build with AI as a foundational element, not an add-on
- **Technical-Creative Fusion** — Solutions that are both technically excellent and emotionally engaging
- **Self-Recursive Improvement** — Systems designed to improve themselves, delivering increasing value over time

---

## FAQ

**What kind of companies work with WAZA?**
Mainly startups and growing companies that need to optimize operations, automate processes, or implement AI.

**How much does it cost?**
We have products with fixed prices and custom projects quoted based on scope. In the first call, we give you a clear range.

**How long does a typical project take?**
Products are ready immediately. Custom projects range from 2 weeks to 3 months depending on complexity.

**Do I need technical knowledge?**
No. We design everything to work without a manual. Training available for deeper needs.

**What if I already have a technical team?**
Even better. We work with your team, train them, and leave them the tools to continue on their own.

---
